steps.title: Preserve the main verb
steps.content: The sentence's main subject is Such a compensatory measure, and its main verb is offers. The blank should modify the measure without creating another main verb before offers.

steps.title: Use the participle modifier
steps.content: A, B, and C are finite verb forms, so they would compete with offers and create an ungrammatical sentence. The participle form modifies the measure and keeps offers as the main verb. The answer is D.
